Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

    liquidation(Liquidation liquidation)
    Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation
    Entry.Builder
    liquidation(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Liquidation> liquidation)

    Entry.Builder

    Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity
    Entry.Builder
    maturity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Maturity> maturity)

    Entry.Builder

  • Method Details

    • acatsPendingOut

      public Entry.Builder acatsPendingOut(AcatsPendingOut acatsPendingOut)

      Used to record the movement of funds or shares to/ from the pending_acats memo location

    • accountId

      public Entry.Builder accountId(String accountId)
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • accountId

      public Entry.Builder accountId(Optional<String> accountId)
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

      Indicates the memo location impacted by an entry

      Used to record the movement of funds or shares during the bookkeeping phase of an account transfer and details related to the account transfer

    • accruedInterest

      public Entry.Builder accruedInterest(EntryAccruedInterest accruedInterest)
      Indicates that the entry references accrued interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the trade

    • accruedInterest

      public Entry.Builder accruedInterest(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryAccruedInterest> accruedInterest)
      Indicates that the entry references accrued interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the trade

    • acquisition

      public Entry.Builder acquisition(Acquisition acquisition)
      Object containing metadata for acquisition events

    • acquisition

      public Entry.Builder acquisition(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Acquisition> acquisition)
      Object containing metadata for acquisition events

    • activityDate

      public Entry.Builder activityDate(ActivityDate activityDate)
      The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed. This date is specific to the institution where the transaction took place, capturing the exact day on which the institution formally records and effects the transaction

    • activityDate

      public Entry.Builder activityDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityDate> activityDate)
      The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed. This date is specific to the institution where the transaction took place, capturing the exact day on which the institution formally records and effects the transaction

    • activityId

      public Entry.Builder activityId(String activityId)
      Apex-generated unique activity identifier

    • activityId

      public Entry.Builder activityId(Optional<String> activityId)
      Apex-generated unique activity identifier

    • activityTime

      public Entry.Builder activityTime(OffsetDateTime activityTime)
      Activity time refers to the precise moment, recorded in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), when a financial transaction is executed as reported to Apex

    • activityTime

      public Entry.Builder activityTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> activityTime)
      Activity time refers to the precise moment, recorded in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), when a financial transaction is executed as reported to Apex

    • allocation

      public Entry.Builder allocation(Allocation allocation)
      Object containing metadata for trade allocation

    • allocation

      public Entry.Builder allocation(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Allocation> allocation)
      Object containing metadata for trade allocation

    • assetId

      public Entry.Builder assetId(String assetId)
      An Apex-provided, global identifier created on a per asset bases which provides connectivity across all areas Required, except for currency movements which should instead have a currency_asset_id

    • assetId

      public Entry.Builder assetId(Optional<String> assetId)
      An Apex-provided, global identifier created on a per asset bases which provides connectivity across all areas Required, except for currency movements which should instead have a currency_asset_id

    • bondDefault

      public Entry.Builder bondDefault(BondDefault bondDefault)
      Object containing metadata for bond defaults

    • bondDefault

      public Entry.Builder bondDefault(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BondDefault> bondDefault)
      Object containing metadata for bond defaults

    • capitalGains

      public Entry.Builder capitalGains(CapitalGains capitalGains)
      Used to record a distribution of cash that an issuer has determined will be declared as income financed from capital gains and not ordinary income and details related to the capital gain

    • capitalGains

      public Entry.Builder capitalGains(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CapitalGains> capitalGains)
      Used to record a distribution of cash that an issuer has determined will be declared as income financed from capital gains and not ordinary income and details related to the capital gain

    • cashDividend

      public Entry.Builder cashDividend(CashDividend cashDividend)
      Used to record the distribution of cash to shareholders, paid by the issuer, usually based upon current earnings and/or accumulated profits as declared by the board of directors and details related to the cash dividend

    • cashDividend

      public Entry.Builder cashDividend(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CashDividend> cashDividend)
      Used to record the distribution of cash to shareholders, paid by the issuer, usually based upon current earnings and/or accumulated profits as declared by the board of directors and details related to the cash dividend

    • cashInLieu

      public Entry.Builder cashInLieu(CashInLieu cashInLieu)
      Object containing metadata for cash in lieu

    • cashInLieu

      public Entry.Builder cashInLieu(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CashInLieu> cashInLieu)
      Object containing metadata for cash in lieu

    • commission

      public Entry.Builder commission(EntryCommission commission)
      Indicates that the entry references commission charged by brokers or financial intermediaries for executing financial transactions on behalf of clients

    • commission

      public Entry.Builder commission(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryCommission> commission)
      Indicates that the entry references commission charged by brokers or financial intermediaries for executing financial transactions on behalf of clients

    • conversion

      public Entry.Builder conversion(Conversion conversion)
      Used to record the conversion of securities (generally convertible bonds or preferred shares) into another form of securities (usually common shares) at a pre-stated price or rate and details related to the conversion

    • conversion

      public Entry.Builder conversion(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Conversion> conversion)
      Used to record the conversion of securities (generally convertible bonds or preferred shares) into another form of securities (usually common shares) at a pre-stated price or rate and details related to the conversion

    • corporateActionMemoAdjustment

      public Entry.Builder corporateActionMemoAdjustment(CorporateActionMemoAdjustment corporateActionMemoAdjustment)
      Object containing metadata for memo locations that have been adjusted due to a corporate action

    • corporateActionMemoAdjustment

      public Entry.Builder corporateActionMemoAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CorporateActionMemoAdjustment> corporateActionMemoAdjustment)
      Object containing metadata for memo locations that have been adjusted due to a corporate action

    • credit

      public Entry.Builder credit(Credit credit)
      Used to disburse funds into a customer's account, typically for purposes such as refunds, interest payments, or rewards from enrolled programs and details related to the credit

    • credit

      public Entry.Builder credit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Credit> credit)
      Used to disburse funds into a customer's account, typically for purposes such as refunds, interest payments, or rewards from enrolled programs and details related to the credit

    • currencyAssetId

      public Entry.Builder currencyAssetId(String currencyAssetId)
      The asset_id of the currency that all monetary values relate to Required for currency movements

    • currencyAssetId

      public Entry.Builder currencyAssetId(Optional<String> currencyAssetId)
      The asset_id of the currency that all monetary values relate to Required for currency movements

    • delivery

      public Entry.Builder delivery(Delivery delivery)
      Object containing metadata for delivery events

    • delivery

      public Entry.Builder delivery(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Delivery> delivery)
      Object containing metadata for delivery events

    • deposit

      public Entry.Builder deposit(Deposit deposit)
      Used to record deposits of funds into an account and capture details related to the deposit

    • deposit

      public Entry.Builder deposit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Deposit> deposit)
      Used to record deposits of funds into an account and capture details related to the deposit

    • description

      public Entry.Builder description(String description)
      A plain text description of the entry; will not be available to search on or build other features off of

    • description

      public Entry.Builder description(Optional<String> description)
      A plain text description of the entry; will not be available to search on or build other features off of

    • drip

      public Entry.Builder drip(Drip drip)
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_drip memo location

    • drip

      public Entry.Builder drip(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Drip> drip)
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_drip memo location

    • entryId

      public Entry.Builder entryId(String entryId)
      The unique id of the entry

    • entryId

      public Entry.Builder entryId(Optional<String> entryId)
      The unique id of the entry

    • exchange

      public Entry.Builder exchange(Exchange exchange)
      Used to record the exchange of certificates for a new security or cash and details related to the exchange

    • exchange

      public Entry.Builder exchange(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Exchange> exchange)
      Used to record the exchange of certificates for a new security or cash and details related to the exchange

    • fee

      public Entry.Builder fee(EntryFee fee)
      Used to record Fees that have been assessed to account and capture details related to the fee

    • fee

      public Entry.Builder fee(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryFee> fee)
      Used to record Fees that have been assessed to account and capture details related to the fee

    • flip

      public Entry.Builder flip(Flip flip)
      Object containing metadata for a Flip

    • flip

      public Entry.Builder flip(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Flip> flip)
      Object containing metadata for a Flip

    • fpsl

      public Entry.Builder fpsl(Fpsl fpsl)
      Used to record the movements of shares to/ from the fpsl memo location and details related to the fpsl memo

    • fpsl

      public Entry.Builder fpsl(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Fpsl> fpsl)
      Used to record the movements of shares to/ from the fpsl memo location and details related to the fpsl memo

    • grossAmount

      public Entry.Builder grossAmount(EntryGrossAmount grossAmount)
      The monetary value of an activity, exclusive of any fees (First money)

    • grossAmount

      public Entry.Builder grossAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryGrossAmount> grossAmount)
      The monetary value of an activity, exclusive of any fees (First money)

    • interest

      public Entry.Builder interest(Interest interest)
      Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest

    • interest

      public Entry.Builder interest(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Interest> interest)
      Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest

    • interestPayment

      public Entry.Builder interestPayment(InterestPayment interestPayment)
      Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment. Usually, the payment is made in cash and on a scheduled basis

    • interestPayment

      public Entry.Builder interestPayment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends InterestPayment> interestPayment)
      Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment. Usually, the payment is made in cash and on a scheduled basis

    • liquidation

      public Entry.Builder liquidation(Liquidation liquidation)
      Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation

    • liquidation

      public Entry.Builder liquidation(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Liquidation> liquidation)
      Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation

    • maturity

      public Entry.Builder maturity(Maturity maturity)
      Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    • maturity

      public Entry.Builder maturity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Maturity> maturity)
      Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    • merger

      public Entry.Builder merger(Merger merger)
      Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger

    • merger

      public Entry.Builder merger(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Merger> merger)
      Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger

    • name

      public Entry.Builder name(String name)
      accounts/{account_id}/entries/{entry_id}

    • name

      public Entry.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      accounts/{account_id}/entries/{entry_id}

    • nameChange

      public Entry.Builder nameChange(NameChange nameChange)
      Used to record changes in the name of a security/securities by the issuer which result in surrendering physical securities or the assigning of a new security identifier which result in new securities being issued and details related to the name changes

    • nameChange

      public Entry.Builder nameChange(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends NameChange> nameChange)
      Used to record changes in the name of a security/securities by the issuer which result in surrendering physical securities or the assigning of a new security identifier which result in new securities being issued and details related to the name changes

    • originalId

      public Entry.Builder originalId(String originalId)
      The original entry id; stable across reversals and corrections; use for maintaining lineage of entries through multiple corrections/reversals

    • originalId

      public Entry.Builder originalId(Optional<String> originalId)
      The original entry id; stable across reversals and corrections; use for maintaining lineage of entries through multiple corrections/reversals

    • originalProcessDate

      public Entry.Builder originalProcessDate(OriginalProcessDate originalProcessDate)
      The original entry process date; stable across reversals and corrections; use for maintaining lineage of entries through multiple corrections/reversals

    • originalProcessDate

      public Entry.Builder originalProcessDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends OriginalProcessDate> originalProcessDate)
      The original entry process date; stable across reversals and corrections; use for maintaining lineage of entries through multiple corrections/reversals

    • paymentInKind

      public Entry.Builder paymentInKind(PaymentInKind paymentInKind)
      Used to record payments on interest-bearing securities where the payment is made in additional securities rather than cash and details related to the payment

    • paymentInKind

      public Entry.Builder paymentInKind(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PaymentInKind> paymentInKind)
      Used to record payments on interest-bearing securities where the payment is made in additional securities rather than cash and details related to the payment

    • price

      public Entry.Builder price(EntryPrice price)
      The monetary value paid for a given security in a trade Required, except for currency movements

    • price

      public Entry.Builder price(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryPrice> price)
      The monetary value paid for a given security in a trade Required, except for currency movements

    • processDate

      public Entry.Builder processDate(EntryProcessDate processDate)
      The date that the entry was booked on

    • processDate

      public Entry.Builder processDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryProcessDate> processDate)
      The date that the entry was booked on

    • quantity

      public Entry.Builder quantity(EntryQuantity quantity)
      The quantity of shares bought, sold, or moved. For entries/ activities involving Fixed Income assets, quantity is expressed as par value Required for trades and memos, optional for movements.

    • quantity

      public Entry.Builder quantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryQuantity> quantity)
      The quantity of shares bought, sold, or moved. For entries/ activities involving Fixed Income assets, quantity is expressed as par value Required for trades and memos, optional for movements.

    • receive

      public Entry.Builder receive(Receive receive)
      Object containing metadata for receive events

    • receive

      public Entry.Builder receive(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Receive> receive)
      Object containing metadata for receive events

    • redemptionFull

      public Entry.Builder redemptionFull(RedemptionFull redemptionFull)
      Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption

    • redemptionFull

      public Entry.Builder redemptionFull(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RedemptionFull> redemptionFull)
      Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption

    • redemptionPartial

      public Entry.Builder redemptionPartial(RedemptionPartial redemptionPartial)
      Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption. The outstanding amount of securities will be proportionally reduced based on a specific percentage of holding

    • redemptionPartial

      public Entry.Builder redemptionPartial(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RedemptionPartial> redemptionPartial)
      Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption. The outstanding amount of securities will be proportionally reduced based on a specific percentage of holding

    • reverseStockSplit

      public Entry.Builder reverseStockSplit(ReverseStockSplit reverseStockSplit)
      Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    • reverseStockSplit

      public Entry.Builder reverseStockSplit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ReverseStockSplit> reverseStockSplit)
      Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    • reversedEntryId

      public Entry.Builder reversedEntryId(String reversedEntryId)
      The entry_id of the original entry; only populated on entries with a status of "Reversal"

    • reversedEntryId

      public Entry.Builder reversedEntryId(Optional<String> reversedEntryId)
      The entry_id of the original entry; only populated on entries with a status of "Reversal"

    • rightsDistribution

      public Entry.Builder rightsDistribution(RightsDistribution rightsDistribution)
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • rightsDistribution

      public Entry.Builder rightsDistribution(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RightsDistribution> rightsDistribution)
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • rightsSubscription

      public Entry.Builder rightsSubscription(RightsSubscription rightsSubscription)
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • rightsSubscription

      public Entry.Builder rightsSubscription(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RightsSubscription> rightsSubscription)
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • roundingAdjustment

      public Entry.Builder roundingAdjustment(RoundingAdjustment roundingAdjustment)
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • roundingAdjustment

      public Entry.Builder roundingAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RoundingAdjustment> roundingAdjustment)
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • saleOfRights

      public Entry.Builder saleOfRights(SaleOfRights saleOfRights)
      Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights

    • saleOfRights

      public Entry.Builder saleOfRights(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends SaleOfRights> saleOfRights)
      Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights

    • settleDate

      public Entry.Builder settleDate(SettleDate settleDate)
      The date a given entry/ activity will officially settle

    • settleDate

      public Entry.Builder settleDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends SettleDate> settleDate)
      The date a given entry/ activity will officially settle

    • side

      public Entry.Builder side(EntrySide side)
      Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell

    • side

      public Entry.Builder side(Optional<? extends EntrySide> side)
      Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell

    • sideModifier

      public Entry.Builder sideModifier(EntrySideModifier sideModifier)
      Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position Should be populated if possible for trades; the side modifier for the trade

    • sideModifier

      public Entry.Builder sideModifier(Optional<? extends EntrySideModifier> sideModifier)
      Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position Should be populated if possible for trades; the side modifier for the trade

    • spinOff

      public Entry.Builder spinOff(SpinOff spinOff)
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • spinOff

      public Entry.Builder spinOff(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends SpinOff> spinOff)
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • state

      public Entry.Builder state(EntryState state)
      Set to be NEW for BookEntries, other statuses will be assigned via ModifyActivities; the state of the entry

    • state

      public Entry.Builder state(Optional<? extends EntryState> state)
      Set to be NEW for BookEntries, other statuses will be assigned via ModifyActivities; the state of the entry

    • stockDividend

      public Entry.Builder stockDividend(StockDividend stockDividend)
      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend

    • stockDividend

      public Entry.Builder stockDividend(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends StockDividend> stockDividend)
      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend

    • stockSplit

      public Entry.Builder stockSplit(StockSplit stockSplit)
      Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split

    • stockSplit

      public Entry.Builder stockSplit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends StockSplit> stockSplit)
      Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split

    • subtypeCategory

      public Entry.Builder subtypeCategory(String subtypeCategory)
      String representation of the metadata object containing more information about an entry/activity

    • subtypeCategory

      public Entry.Builder subtypeCategory(Optional<String> subtypeCategory)
      String representation of the metadata object containing more information about an entry/activity

    • sweep

      public Entry.Builder sweep(Sweep sweep)
      Used to record sweeps from a cash balance to an alternative asset or vice versa and details related to the sweep

    • sweep

      public Entry.Builder sweep(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Sweep> sweep)
      Used to record sweeps from a cash balance to an alternative asset or vice versa and details related to the sweep

    • tenderOffer

      public Entry.Builder tenderOffer(TenderOffer tenderOffer)
      Used to record the sale of securities for a specified price due to an offer from the issuer or a third party and details related to the tender offer

    • tenderOffer

      public Entry.Builder tenderOffer(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TenderOffer> tenderOffer)
      Used to record the sale of securities for a specified price due to an offer from the issuer or a third party and details related to the tender offer

    • trade

      public Entry.Builder trade(EntryTrade trade)
      Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade

    • trade

      public Entry.Builder trade(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryTrade> trade)
      Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade

    • transfer

      public Entry.Builder transfer(EntryTransfer transfer)
      Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer. The transfer type and activity_description can be used to provide more specific context

    • transfer

      public Entry.Builder transfer(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryTransfer> transfer)
      Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer. The transfer type and activity_description can be used to provide more specific context

    • type

      public Entry.Builder type(EntryType type)
      The Type of the entry; determines the set of mandatory fields as well as informing downstream processes how to handle this record

    • type

      public Entry.Builder type(Optional<? extends EntryType> type)
      The Type of the entry; determines the set of mandatory fields as well as informing downstream processes how to handle this record

    • unitSplit

      public Entry.Builder unitSplit(UnitSplit unitSplit)
      Used to record increases in the number of units outstanding through the issuing of more units to current shareholders and details related to the unit split

    • unitSplit

      public Entry.Builder unitSplit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends UnitSplit> unitSplit)
      Used to record increases in the number of units outstanding through the issuing of more units to current shareholders and details related to the unit split

    • warrantExercise

      public Entry.Builder warrantExercise(WarrantExercise warrantExercise)
      Used to record the exchange of warrants for shares and details related to the warrant exercise. The exercise will commonly require a payment based upon a pre-determined value and time and details related to the warrant exercise

    • warrantExercise

      public Entry.Builder warrantExercise(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends WarrantExercise> warrantExercise)
      Used to record the exchange of warrants for shares and details related to the warrant exercise. The exercise will commonly require a payment based upon a pre-determined value and time and details related to the warrant exercise

    • withdrawal

      public Entry.Builder withdrawal(Withdrawal withdrawal)
      Used to record withdrawals of funds from an account and capture details related to the withdrawal

    • withdrawal

      public Entry.Builder withdrawal(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Withdrawal> withdrawal)
      Used to record withdrawals of funds from an account and capture details related to the withdrawal

    • withdrawalPendingReview

      public Entry.Builder withdrawalPendingReview(WithdrawalPendingReview withdrawalPendingReview)
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_withdrawal memo location

    • withdrawalPendingReview

      public Entry.Builder withdrawalPendingReview(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends WithdrawalPendingReview> withdrawalPendingReview)
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_withdrawal memo location

    • withholding

      public Entry.Builder withholding(EntryWithholding withholding)
      Used to record tax withholdings and details related to the withholding

    • withholding

      public Entry.Builder withholding(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EntryWithholding> withholding)
      Used to record tax withholdings and details related to the withholding

    • worthless

      public Entry.Builder worthless(Worthless worthless)
      Used to record the removal of positions in a given security when the DTC has received formal notice that the security is worthless and details related to the worthless event

    • worthless

      public Entry.Builder worthless(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Worthless> worthless)
      Used to record the removal of positions in a given security when the DTC has received formal notice that the security is worthless and details related to the worthless event

    • build

      public Entry build()
